testcase.name: test_comic_storybook_v2_job_status_endpoint

failure.message: AssertionError: Unexpected status: 502 assert 502 in [200, 404] + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_bug_fixes_iteration263.py:149: in test_comic_storybook_v2_job_status_endpoint assert response.status_code in [200, 404], f"Unexpected status: {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Unexpected status: 502 E assert 502 in [200, 404] E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_comic_storybook_v2_genres_endpoint

failure.message: AssertionError: Genres endpoint failed: 502 assert 502 == 200 + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_bug_fixes_iteration263.py:158: in test_comic_storybook_v2_genres_endpoint assert response.status_code == 200, f"Genres endpoint failed: {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Genres endpoint failed: 502 E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_comic_storybook_v2_preview_endpoint

failure.message: AssertionError: Preview endpoint failed: 502 assert 502 in [200, 400, 422] + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_bug_fixes_iteration263.py:186: in test_comic_storybook_v2_preview_endpoint assert response.status_code in [200, 400, 422], f"Preview endpoint failed: {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Preview endpoint failed: 502 E assert 502 in [200, 400, 422] E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code
